message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Player" as Player1
rectangle "Portal Service" {
    participant "Telnet Server" as TelnetServer
    participant "Connection Manager" as ConnectionManager
    participant "Middleware" as Middleware
}
participant "World Service" as WorldService

Player1 -> TelnetServer : 1. connects to server
activate TelnetServer
TelnetServer -> ConnectionManager : 2. passes connection to manager
activate ConnectionManager
ConnectionManager -> ConnectionManager : 3. calls configured OnConnect callbacks
ConnectionManager -> Middleware : 4. calls all Middleware OnConnect callbacks
activate Middleware
deactivate Middleware
ConnectionManager -> ConnectionManager : 5. start main Connection loop
ConnectionManager -> WorldService : 6. initialize World session
activate WorldService
deactivate WorldService
deactivate ConnectionManager
deactivate TelnetServer

hide circle
@enduml
```
